name: Maximum Liability Cap
description: Contracts must include a liability cap no more than 2x the contract value
check: Liability cap must not exceed 2x contract value

name: Termination Notice Period
description: Termination notice must be at least 30 days

name: Confidentiality Duration
description: Confidentiality obligations must last at least 2 years after termination

name: Data Protection Clause Required
description: All contracts handling personal data must include a data protection clause
check: Data protection clause present if personal data involved

name: Governing Law
description: Contracts must specify governing law jurisdiction

name: Intellectual Property Rights
description: IP ownership must be clearly defined for work product
check: IP ownership clause present and unambiguous

name: Indemnification Scope
description: Indemnification must be mutual and capped

name: Force Majeure Clause
description: Contracts over 12 months must include force majeure provisions
check: Force majeure clause present for long-term contracts

name: Payment Terms
description: Payment terms must not exceed Net-60

name: Auto-Renewal Restriction
description: Auto-renewal clauses must include opt-out notice of at least 60 days
